name: Agricultural Income Subsidy (PM-KISAN)
description: Direct income support and primary agricultural subsidy of Rs. 6,000 per year to farmer families.

benefits.installments: Three equal payments of Rs. 2,000 every four months
benefits.delivery: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to bank accounts

keywords: money, cash, fund, seed, fertilizer, income support, financial help, 6000, installment, subsidy

name: Irrigation Subsidy (PMKSY)
description: Major irrigation subsidy focusing on achieving 'Har Khet Ko Pani' (water for every field) by enhancing irrigation coverage.

benefits.subsidy: Up to 55% for small/marginal farmers, 45% for others
benefits.systems: Covers Drip and Sprinkler irrigation setup
benefits.impact: Improves water use efficiency and significantly boosts crop yield

keywords: water, drip, sprinkler, irrigation, pipe, subsidy, saving, yield, equipment

name: Solar Pump Subsidy (PM-KUSUM)
description: Revolutionizing farm energy by providing up to 60% subsidy for solar-powered irrigation pumps.
authority: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

benefits.subsidy: Up to 60% of the cost of solar pump
benefits.income: Option to sell surplus solar power back to the grid

keywords: solar, pump, water, irrigation, pipe, electricity, energy, equipment, subsidy

name: Quality Seed & Input Subsidy (NFSM)
description: Aims to increase productivity via subsidies for quality seeds, bio-fertilizers, and micronutrients.

benefits.seed_subsidy: Financial assistance for high-yielding variety seeds
benefits.input_support: Subsidies for bio-fertilizers, micronutrients, and soil health inputs
benefits.demonstrations: Free field demonstrations and training for farmers

keywords: seed, fertilizer, grain, rice, wheat, pulses, subsidy, productivity, food security

name: Organic Farming Subsidy (PKVY)
description: A flagship subsidy scheme to promote organic farming through cluster-based mobilization. It provides financial assistance of Rs. 50,000 per hectare.

benefits.input_support: Covers organic seeds, bio-fertilizers, and bio-pesticides

keywords: organic, bio, natural, toxin free, healthy, subsidy, certification, cluster

name: Horticulture Infrastructure Subsidy (MIDH)
description: Focuses on horticulture sector growth, providing primary subsidies for polyhouses, greenhouses, and cold storage.
keywords: horticulture, fruit, vegetable, polyhouse, greenhouse, cold storage, garden, subsidy

name: Crop Insurance Premium Subsidy (PMFBY)
description: The Government of India pays up to 98% of the crop insurance premium as a direct subsidy to farmers.

benefits.premium_support: Covers majority of the insurance cost
benefits.impact: Protects against complete crop failure due to weather
benefits.access: Mandatory for loanee farmers, optional for others

keywords: insurance, bima, subsidy, premium, support, safety

name: State Agricultural Project Subsidy (RKVY)
description: Empowers states to develop programs with substantial subsidies for innovative farming and local infrastructure projects.

benefits.subsidy: Up to 50% for capital intensive farm projects
benefits.flexibility: States can design projects based on local farmer needs

keywords: rkvy, state, project, subsidy, development

name: Soil Health Card & Nutrient Subsidy (SHC)
description: Promotes balanced fertilizer use by subsidizing soil testing and the purchase of recommended micro-nutrients.

benefits.testing: Free soil testing and health card issuance

keywords: soil, test, health card, fertilizer, subsidy

name: Marketing Infrastructure Subsidy (ISAM)
description: Provides back-ended capital subsidies for the creation of storage and mandi infrastructure.

benefits.limit: Up to Rs. 3 Crore for specific projects

keywords: marketing, storage, warehouse, subsidy

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: The most vital credit scheme for farmers, providing timely access to short-term loans for crop cultivation and farm maintenance at subsidized interest rates.

benefits.limit: Flexible based on land and crop

keywords: loan, credit, card, kcc, interest, bank

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
description: Long-term debt financing facility for investment in post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets.

benefits.subvention: 3% interest subvention for loans up to Rs. 2 Crore

keywords: loan, infrastructure, warehouse, cold storage, aif

name: Interest Subvention Scheme
description: Ensures that short-term crop loans are available at an affordable interest rate. Banks get subvention, which is passed to farmers.

benefits.rate: Subsidized interest rate on short-term credit

keywords: interest, subvention, loan, bank, miss

name: Land Purchase Loan
description: Assists small and marginal farmers in purchasing additional land to make their holdings more viable and productive.

benefits.purpose: Acquisition of arable land for cultivation

keywords: land, buy, purchase, agricultural, loan

name: Farm Mechanization Loan
description: Credit for purchasing tractors, power tillers, and other high-value agricultural machinery to improve yield and efficiency.
keywords: tractor, machinery, equipment, loan, tools

name: Produce Pledge Loan
description: Enables farmers to store produce in warehouses and get credit against receipts, avoiding harvest-time distress sales.

benefits.credit: Loan up to 75% of produce value
benefits.limit: Up to Rs. 50 Lakh against receipt

keywords: marketing, warehouse, receipt, pledge, loan

name: Gold Loan
description: Quick credit option pledging gold ornaments for immediate agricultural needs at subsidized interest rates.
keywords: gold, loan, jewel, money, quick

name: National Horticulture Board (NHB) Horticulture Loan
description: Financial assistance for developmental projects in commercial horticulture, including production and post-harvest infra.
keywords: horticulture, fruit, vegetable, loan, nhb

name: Agri-Clinics and Agri-Business Centres (ACABC) Loan
description: Loans for agri-graduates to start ventures like soil testing labs or machinery banks to support local farmers.

benefits.amount: Up to Rs. 20 Lakh for individuals

keywords: startup, venture, business, loan, graduate

name: Micro Irrigation Fund
description: Concessional loans to states for top-up subsidies on drip and sprinkler systems to expand micro-irrigation reach.
keywords: irrigation, water, fund, loan, nabard

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Flagship crop insurance scheme protecting against natural calamities, pests, and diseases for all major crops.

benefits.coverage: Protects against drought, flood, pests, and fire
benefits.premium: Capped at 2% for Kharif and 1.5% for Rabi crops

keywords: insurance, bima, claim, safety, crop protection

name: Restructured Weather Based Crop Insurance (RWBCIS)
description: Insurance based on weather parameters like rainfall, temperature, and wind speed rather than yield assessment.

benefits.fast_claim: Automatic settlement based on weather station data
benefits.specificity: Covers high heat, low rain, or sudden frost

keywords: weather, rain, heat, insurance, bima, climate

name: Unified Package Insurance Scheme (UPIS)
description: A composite insurance covering crop, household assets, cattle, and personal accident for a single premium.

benefits.all_in_one: Safety for crop, tractor, and farmer family
benefits.convenience: Single window for multiple protection needs

keywords: unified, package, insurance, bima, all-in-one

name: Pilot Seed Crop Insurance Scheme
description: Covers seed crop at various stages to compensate for losses during seed production stages.

benefits.specialized: Focuses on the high risk of seed production
benefits.coverage: Compensates for purity and germination failure

keywords: seed, production, insurance, crop, breeder

name: Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme (CPIS)
description: Specifically designed for coconut growers to protect palms against natural disasters and pests.

benefits.per_tree: Compensation based on the number of palms lost
benefits.protection: Covers storm, lightning, and specific pests

keywords: coconut, tree, palm, insurance, bima, plantation

name: Index Based Crop Insurance (Wheat)
description: Innovative insurance using satellite imagery and indices to detect wheat crop stress and trigger payouts.

benefits.hi_tech: Uses remote sensing for accurate loss detection
benefits.fairness: Eliminates manual survey errors in yield calculation

keywords: wheat, satellite, index, insurance, bima, smart

name: Horticulture Yield Based Insurance
description: Protects fruit crops like Mango, Citrus, and Grapes against yield variations and market failures.

benefits.high_value: Coverage suitable for expensive plantation crops
benefits.pest_focus: Specific terms for pest outbreaks in orchards

keywords: fruit, mango, orchard, insurance, bima, horticulture

name: Weather Index Based Compensation
description: State-specific compensation for crops not covered under PMFBY, triggered by extreme weather events.

benefits.emergency: Quick relief during unseasonal heavy rains or drought
benefits.broad: Covers minor crops and local specific varieties

keywords: weather, relief, compensation, damage, disaster

name: Sugarcane Crop Insurance
description: Specialized coverage for sugarcane crops against weather perils and specific pests, ensuring financial stability for annual commercial growers.
authority: Ministry of Agriculture / State Agri Dept

benefits.yield_protection: Compensation for yield loss compared to historical average
benefits.peril_coverage: Covers fire, drought, and specific sugarcane pests

keywords: sugarcane, sugar, crop, insurance, commercial, bima

name: Village Level Yield Insurance
description: Aggregated insurance where claims are determined by the average yield of the village compared to historical data.

benefits.community: Entire village receives claims if yield drops
benefits.stability: Ensures collective resilience against local failures

keywords: yield, village, community, insurance, bima

name: Rural Youth Skill Training (STRY)
description: Focuses on providing vocational skills to rural youth in agricultural and allied fields to improve employability.

benefits.skill: Certificate in organic farming, nursery, or pest control
benefits.stipend: Assistance provided during the training period

keywords: training, education, youth, skill, job

name: KVK Farm Science Training
description: Direct training at Krishi Vigyan Kendras on latest technologies, crop varieties, and best practices in farming.

benefits.hands_on: Practical field demonstrations and local guidance

keywords: training, kvk, science, farm, practice

name: Farmer Field School (FFS)
description: A field-based learning process where farmers experiment and learn 'what works' in their own environment.

benefits.peer_learning: Group learning from fellow active farmers
benefits.solution: Focuses on resolving local field problems on-site

keywords: school, field, learning, group, experiment

name: Digital Agriculture & App Training
description: Training farmers to use digital tools, e-NAM portal, and mobile apps for weather and market intelligence.

benefits.hi_tech: Learn to use apps for soil health and market prices
benefits.transparency: Eliminate middlemen via direct digital trading skills

keywords: digital, app, mobile, internet, training

name: ACABC Entrepreneurship Training
description: 45-day residential training for agri-graduates on starting and managing private extension services.

benefits.certification: Eligible for capital subsidy loans after completion

keywords: startup, entrepreneur, business, training, college

name: Organic Certification Training
description: Specialized training on organic input production, certification processes (PGS-India), and soil rejuvenation.

benefits.organic: Master the art of bio-fertilizer and bio-pesticide making
benefits.premium: Learn to get certification for high-value export crops

keywords: organic, bio, natural, certification, training

name: ASCI Agriculture Skill Training
description: Short-term courses for specialized jobs like polyhouse technician, tractor driver, or quality checker.

benefits.certified: NSDC certificate valid across India for employment

keywords: skill, course, job, technical, training

name: FPO CEO & Management Training
description: Training for leaders of Farmer Producer Organizations on governance, inventory, and collective marketing.

benefits.leadership: Learn how to manage large groups and finances
benefits.networking: Connectivity with major retailers and exporters

keywords: fpo, management, leadership, group, training

name: Training for Women Farmers (Mahila Kisan)
description: Targeted programs for women on nutrition gardens, value addition, and drudgery reduction tools.

benefits.empower: Focus on income-generating activities for women
benefits.support: Free tools and seeds for nutrition garden setup

keywords: women, garden, nutrition, empowerment, training

name: Master Farmer Training Program
description: Advanced training for successful farmers to become 'Krishi Doot' or extension agents to teach others.

benefits.status: Recognition as a Progressive Farmer in the district
benefits.income: Eligible for honorary grants for conducting local sessions

keywords: expert, master, teacher, progress, training

name: Sub-Mission on Agri Mechanization (SMAM)
description: The primary mission providing 40% to 50% subsidy for any farm machinery including plows and sowers.

benefits.huge_saving: Get expensive tools at nearly half the market price
benefits.broad_range: Valid for almost all manual and power-driven implements

keywords: equipment, machinery, tools, subsidy, smam

name: PM Kisan Tractor Subsidy
description: Specific subsidy for small farmers to own their first tractor to improve farm throughput.

benefits.max_subsidy: Up to Rs. 1 Lakh to Rs. 3 Lakh based on HP
benefits.ownership: Enables small farmers to stop renting tractors

keywords: tractor, vehicle, wheel, power, equipment

name: Custom Hiring Centre (CHC) Grant
description: Provides 40% grant to individuals or 80% to groups for setting up machines for rent to neighbors.

benefits.rental_income: Earn by renting your machines to others
benefits.communal: Groups get massive funding to buy combined harvesters

keywords: rent, hire, center, machine, equipment, chc

name: Kisan Drone Subsidy
description: Up to 100% grant for research institutes and 40-50% for farmers to use drones for spraying and mapping.

benefits.efficient: Spray fertilizer/pesticides in 15 mins per acre
benefits.safe: Avoids human contact with harmful chemicals

keywords: drone, fly, spray, tech, equipment, air

name: Power Tiller & Weeder Subsidy
description: Financial aid specifically for small-scale mechanical tillers suitable for narrow hills and small plots.

benefits.affordable: Low-cost alternative to tractors for small farmers
benefits.multiple: Attachment options for weeding, pumping, and transport

keywords: tiller, weeder, motor, small, equipment

name: Solar Equipment & Light Trap Subsidy
description: Subsidizes solar-powered insect light traps, solar dryers, and solar fence units to protect crops.

benefits.zero_cost: No recurring electricity bills for farm protection
benefits.eco_friendly: Chemical-free pest management using light traps

keywords: solar, light, trap, fence, dryer, equipment

name: Post Harvest Tool Kit (PHTM)
description: Subsidies for small cleaning, grading, and sorting machines to increase crop market value at the farm gate.

benefits.value_add: Sell graded crops at 20% higher price
benefits.quality: Reduces moisture and dirt before reaching the mandi

keywords: clean, grade, sort, pack, equipment, post-harvest

name: Combined Harvester Subsidy
description: Financial assistance for high-capacity harvesting machines to reduce manual labor during peak season.

benefits.time_saver: Complete harvest of 1 acre in 1 hour
benefits.saving: Reduces dependency on scarce agricultural labor

keywords: harvest, grain, rice, wheat, equipment, machine

name: Modern Irrigation Tool Subsidy
description: Covers motors, pipes, and tanks specifically for rainwater harvesting and distribution systems.

benefits.storage: Funds for building farm ponds and community tanks
benefits.distribution: Subsidized PVC pipes and high-efficiency pumps

keywords: pump, pipe, tank, water, equipment, distribution

name: Improved Manual Tools Kit
description: Distributes high-quality ergonomic manual tools at 90% subsidy for women and tribal farmers.

benefits.relief: Reduces physical strain using modern ergonomic designs
benefits.effective: Better weeding and sowing than traditional old tools

keywords: manual, tools, small, hand, equipment, kit

name: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
description: An online trading platform that connects your local mandi to buyers across India for better prices.

benefits.price: Real-time pricing data and multiple bidders for your crop
benefits.direct: Get payments directly into your bank after online trade

keywords: market, online, trade, price, enam, sell

name: AIF Storage Infrastructure
description: Funding to build your own cold storage or warehouse to avoid selling when prices are low.

benefits.infra: Own your storage space with government funding assistance
benefits.marketing: Hold produce until market peaks for maximum profit

keywords: storage, marketing, warehouse, aif, infrastructure

name: Operation Greens (TOP-II)
description: Support for price stabilization and integrated value chain for Tomatos, Onions, Potatoes, and 22 other crops.

benefits.logistics: 50% subsidy on transportation from farm to market
benefits.storage: 50% subsidy on hiring storage space in peak months

keywords: marketing, transportation, storage, potato, onion, tomato

name: Agmarknet Price Information
description: A transparent portal providing daily market arrivals and price trends from 3000+ nodes nationwide.

benefits.knowledge: Know today's price in nearby cities before leaving home
benefits.trending: Analyze seasonal trends to decide next crop planting

keywords: marketing, price, info, news, agmarknet, trend

name: Kisan Rail Transport
description: Special train service for perishable goods (fruits, veg) with 50% subsidy on freight charges.

benefits.fast: Reaches distant markets (e.g., Delhi) in 48 hours with fresh crops
benefits.cheap: Huge saving on long-distance trucking costs

keywords: train, rail, marketing, transportation, fresh, distance

name: Agri Marketing Infrastructure (AMI)
description: A sub-scheme of ISAM focused on strengthening rural mandis and primary processing clusters.

benefits.local: Better facilities (grading, weighing) in your own village mandi
benefits.scientific: Reduction in physical handling damage during sale

keywords: marketing, infra, mandi, rural, village, facility

name: Price Support Scheme (PSS)
description: Direct procurement by NAFED/FCI when market price falls below Minimum Support Price (MSP) for pulses and oilseeds.

benefits.guarantee: Govt buys your crop at MSP if open market fails
benefits.security: Ensures you never sell at a loss regardless of market surplus

keywords: marketing, msp, pss, nafed, procurement, buy

name: Market Intervention Scheme (MIS)
description: Compensation for horticulture crops during years of over-production when prices crash significantly.

benefits.relief: Covers losses for crops not covered under regular MSP
benefits.bailout: Activated during sudden market collapses for potato or ginger

keywords: marketing, crash, intervention, relief, compensation

name: Agri Export Zone (AEZ) Benefit
description: Support for farmers to export high-quality products to international markets via APEDA clusters.

benefits.global: Direct access to buyers in Dubai, Europe, and USA
benefits.premium: Earn 5x higher prices for export-quality organic produce

keywords: marketing, export, international, global, high-value

name: Gramin Bhandaran Yojana
description: Grants for building scientific storage for farm produce in rural areas to improve shelf life.

benefits.shelf_life: Scientific design protects against moisture and rats
benefits.access: No need to travel to city cold storage units

keywords: marketing, storage, rural, gramin, warehouse, bhandaran
